batch.jobdefinition.nodeproperties.CfnAb: An object representing the node properties of a multi-node parallel job.

batch.jobdefinition.nodeproperties.MainN.Description: Specifies the node index for the main node of a multi-node parallel job. This node index value must be fewer than the number of nodes.

batch.jobdefinition.nodeproperties.NodeR.Description: A list of node ranges and their properties associated with a multi-node parallel job.

batch.jobdefinition.nodeproperties.NumNo.Description: The number of nodes associated with a multi-node parallel job.
